articles.headline: World Cup live updates: USA takes on Bosnia-Herzegovina in round of 32
articles.description: The United States kicks off its 2026 FIFA World Cup knockout stage as take on Bosnia-Herzegovina in the round of 32.

articles.headline: Belgium pulls off stunning comeback to eliminate Senegal
articles.description: Youri Tielemans scored from the penalty spot in stoppage time of extra time, and Belgium came back from two goals down to beat Senegal 3-2 Wednesday in the Round of 32 at the World Cup.

articles.headline: World Cup Daily live: Belgium wins it over Senegal with latest winner in WC history
articles.description: We have three matches for you on Wednesday as the round-of-32 action at the 2026 World Cup continues.

articles.headline: Christian Pulisic returns to USMNT lineup vs. Bosnia-Herzegovina
articles.description: Christian Pulisic has been named in the USMNT's starting lineup for Wednesday's World Cup round-of-32 clash with Bosnia-Herzegovina after recovering from a calf injury.

articles.headline: Chaos at Brussels watch party after Belgium's dramatic comeback
articles.description: Chaos at Brussels watch party after Belgium's dramatic comeback

articles.headline: 'Icons' Modric, Ronaldo battle to avoid World Cup send-off
articles.description: Luka Modric and Cristiano Ronaldo are "two great icons of world football," Portugal midfielder Vitinha said on Wednesday ahead of his team's clash with Croatia.
